name: Cyclerion Therapeutics, Inc.
description: Cyclerion Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development of soluble guanylate cyclase (sGC) stimulators for the treatment of serious and orphan diseases. The company's pipeline includes clinical-stage programs targeting central nervous system (CNS) disorders, such as mitochondrial encephalomyopathy, lactic acidosis, and stroke-like episodes (MELAS), as well as other cognitive and neurodegenerative conditions. Cyclerion aims to leverage its expertise in the nitric oxide-sGC-cGMP signaling pathway to discover and develop innovative therapies that address significant unmet medical needs.
